filesystem.description: Gives Claude Opus read/write access to the full project. Replace /path/to/your/economicbridge with your actual project root path before using.

postgres.description: Gives Claude Opus live access to your local database. Claude can inspect tenant schemas, verify isolation, check table structures, and run test queries. Uses local dev credentials only — never point at production.

github.description: Gives Claude Opus access to your GitHub repo — read issues, PRs, commit history, and file contents. Required for context when fixing bugs or reviewing PRs.

aws-kb-retrieval.description: Optional: AWS Knowledge Base retrieval. Useful for querying your AWS infrastructure state during development.
